title: Section 23A
content: 1 [ 2 [23A. Conveyance facilities.―Every Judge shall be entitled to a staff car and 3 [two hundred litres of fuel every month or the actual consumption of fuel] per month, whichever is less.]]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 36 of 1976, s. 4 (w.e.f. 1-10-1974). 2. Subs. by Act 38 of 1986, s. 10, for section 23A (w.e.f. 1-11-1986). 3. Subs. by Act 20 of 1996, s. 2, for certain words (w.e.f. 11-1-1996).
